contact.title: Contact Us
contact.get_in_touch_description: Connect with us through these platforms
contact.links_github_description: Report issues, contribute code, or check our latest updates
contact.links_discord_description: Join our server for support, discussions and showing off your custom cards!
contact.links_bluesky_description: Follow us on Bluesky for more updates and announcements!
contact.links_kofi_description: Donate to FABKIT on ko-fi to support development of the site going forward!
contact.about_paragraph_1: Our goal is simple: creating high-quality tools for the Flesh and Blood TCG community. As passionate FaB players ourselves, we saw opportunities to build meaningful tools for fellow enthusiasts.
contact.about_paragraph_2: Our current flagship tool is the Custom Card Creator. We've invested considerable effort into making sure our tool generates cards that look as close to real Flesh and Blood cards as possible, complete with official fonts, proper symbols, and meticulously crafted templates.
contact.about_paragraph_3: We believe these great tools should be accessible to everyone, which is why FABKIT runs entirely in your browser without requiring downloads. Our commitment to the community extends to making the platform open source, allowing players to contribute and help shape our future.
contact.about_paragraph_4_intro: This project is a labor of love that we actively develop in our spare time, driven purely by our passion for the game. We're not sponsored or backed by anyone, we're just some friends who wanted to build something awesome for fellow players. However, any
contact.about_paragraph_4_outro: will help us dedicate more time to bringing new features to life and keeping everything free for the community.
contact.team_thencros_description: Product concept, graphic design & UI development
contact.team_dealloc_description: Application architecture developer in React framework
contact.supporters_subtext: Every supporter gets their name on our website as well as a role on our discord server!

roadmap.support_description: Help us keep building awesome features
roadmap.suggestions_text: We'd love to hear from you! Let us know what features you'd like to see.
